title: User can search for products by keyword

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Search returns products matching the keyword in title or description
acceptanceCriteria.gherkin: Given a customer is on the product page When they enter a search term Then products containing that term are displayed

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Search results are displayed within 2 seconds
acceptanceCriteria.gherkin: Given a search query is submitted When results are rendered Then load time is under 2 seconds
Given search field is empty When search is submitted Then all available products are shown

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: No results message shown when search matches nothing
acceptanceCriteria.gherkin: Given a search term with no matches When search completes Then 'No products found' message is displayed
acceptanceCriteria.jtbd: Know when search yields no results
